messages.author: synthetic-support-lead
messages.text: We are seeing resilient checkout and cart recovery reports, but deduplication is incomplete.

messages.author: synthetic-analyst
messages.text: The checkout completion rate moved in the same direction; confidence intervals overlap for two cohorts.

messages.author: synthetic-pm
messages.text: Add it to synthesis with the caveat and linked evidence IDs.
